name: Granite 3.0 8B Instruct
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (GQA, RoPE, SwiGLU, RMSNorm)
note: Dense 8B enterprise LLM trained on 12T tokens across 12 languages/116 code languages for RAG, tool use and summarization.

results.notes: AGI-Eval, 5-shot pass@1. Present in HF model-index YAML and corroborated verbatim in the Granite 3.0 technical report (Table 10, arxiv/paper.pdf via github.com/ibm-granite/granite-3.0-language-models).
OBQA, 0-shot pass@1. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.

SIQA, 0-shot pass@1. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10. Note: this exceeds the taxonomy's documented siqa range (40-68) by ~3 points; the number is nonetheless exactly what IBM's own model card and paper state.
WinoGrande, 5-shot pass@1. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
TruthfulQA, 0-shot. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
ARC-C, 25-shot. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.

GPQA, 0-shot. IBM's own self-reported eval (distinct from the much lower HF Open-LLM-Leaderboard-style GPQA figures seen on later Granite models). Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
BBH, 3-shot. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
Listed as 'HumanEvalSynthesis' pass@1 on the model card / technical report Table 10.
MBPP, pass@1. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
GSM8K, 5-shot CoT. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
MATH, 4-shot. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.
MGSM averaged across 6 languages, 5-shot. Confirmed in HF model-index YAML and technical report Table 10.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via HF model card (fetched): 8.1B params, 4K context, Apache 2.0, released 2024-10-21 (matches record exactly). All 5 result rows (IFEval 52.27, MMLU 65.82, MMLU-Pro 34.45, HellaSwag 82.61, MT-Bench 8.22) confirmed literally present on the cited HF model card. No changes made.
